notes: Rigger 3 Vehicle Customization chapter (pp. 108â€“155). Each mod has Design Specifications (DP cost, used when building a new vehicle) and Customization Specifications (nuyen cost, used when modifying an existing vehicle). CF = Cargo Factor consumed. Load Reduction = kg subtracted from available Load. 'designOnly' mods cannot be added post-build.

categories.name: Engine Modifications
categories.description: Power plant upgrades that affect Speed, Acceleration, or Load.

categories.name: Protective System Modifications
categories.description: Armor, passenger protection, and environmental sealing.

categories.name: Signature Modifications
categories.description: Thermal, radar, and acoustic signature reduction.

categories.name: Vehicle Weapon Mounts
categories.description: Fixed mounts, turrets, missile systems, and associated hardware.

categories.name: Electronic Systems
categories.description: Sensors, ECM/ECCM, drone control, and electronic warfare equipment.

categories.name: Accessories
categories.description: Utility equipment: anti-theft, medical, cargo, seating, and special systems.

categories.name: Design-Only Options
categories.description: Options only available during initial vehicle design, not post-build customization.

mods.name: Engine Customization
mods.description: Increases Speed by 30, Acceleration by 2, or Load by (Body Ã— 50) kg per level. Each stat raised separately. Secret Build/Repair Test required; failure adds permanent Stress Points.
mods.dpCost: Power plant DP × 1.25 (1st level); increase multiplier by 0.5 each additional level
mods.costNuyen: Power plant cost × 1.25 (1st level); increase multiplier by 0.15 each additional level
mods.skillTN: Ground/Water: levels+3; Drones/Hovercraft: levels+4; Aircraft: levels+5
mods.maxRating: Speed/Accel/Load × 1.5 (custom); × 1.75 (design); one full level per category

mods.name: GridLink Power
mods.description: Allows electrical ground vehicles to draw power from magnetic induction coils in road surface. Ground vehicles only.
mods.restrictions: Ground vehicles only; electrical engines only

mods.name: Nitrous Oxide Injectors
mods.description: Adds (injector level) dice to Accelerating/Braking Tests. Can boost Speed to (standard Speed Ã— 2.5) for one turn. 20 charges per cylinder. Diesel/gasoline engines only.

mods.name: SunCell Power
mods.description: Solar cells produce (Body × 25) PF/hr under clear skies; half in cloud; zero at night. Electric engines only. Not for motorcycles.

mods.name: Turbocharging / Superconductive Drive
mods.description: Each level: +15 Speed, +10 Acceleration, -1 Signature, Economy × 0.95. Non-electric aircraft cannot be turbocharged.
mods.skillTN: Ground/Water: levels+2; Drones/Hovercraft: levels+3; Electric aircraft: levels+4
mods.maxRating: Speed × 1.25 round down (design); Speed × 1.5 (custom); at least 1 level always possible

mods.name: Adjusted Controls
mods.description: Modifies controls for dwarf, troll, or other metahuman ergonomics. Wrong controls give +3 to all driving-related tests. Size doesn't matter when rigging.
mods.notes: Wrong-sized controls impose +3 TN to all driving tests

mods.name: Advanced Drone Pilot
mods.description: Increases vehicle Pilot rating above the default 1. Rating 3 ≈ average metahuman; Rating 5 = 1,000+ hours flight equivalent.

mods.name: Autonavigation System
mods.description: Rating adds dice to Driving Tests. Rating 2+ can self-drive. Rating 3 navigates rough terrain. Rating 4 plans and dynamically modifies routes.
mods.availability: R1: 2/96 hrs; R2: 3/6 days; R3: 4/8 days; R4: 6/14 days
mods.skillTN: 8 - Handling rating (use on-road Handling for ground vehicles)
mods.restrictions: R2 off-road doubles TNs without R3

mods.name: Contingency Maneuver Controls (CMC)
mods.description: Vehicle ignores damage modifiers for (rating) damage boxes (e.g. Rating 3 ignores Light + Moderate). Does not compensate for rigger's personal damage.
mods.notes: Ignores damage modifiers for (rating) damage boxes

mods.name: Datajack Port
mods.description: Allows direct control via datajack (+1 Reaction without VCR). VCR requires full rigger adaptation. Not needed if vehicle already has rigger adaptation.

mods.name: Drive-by-Wire Systems
mods.description: Computer-controlled steering replaces mechanical systems. Each level: -1 Handling, one-time +10% × level split among Speed/Accel/Load (not cumulative). Three separate successful tests to install.

mods.name: Improved Control Surfaces
mods.description: Watercraft only. Each increment -1 Handling. Not compatible with drive-by-wire. Maximum -2 total.
mods.restrictions: Watercraft only; not compatible with drive-by-wire

mods.name: Improved Suspension
mods.description: Ground vehicles only. Each level -1 on-road Handling (motorcycles: both on- and off-road equally). Not compatible with drive-by-wire. Maximum -2.
mods.restrictions: Ground vehicles only; not compatible with drive-by-wire

mods.name: Off-Road Suspension
mods.description: Each level: -1 off-road Handling, +1 on-road Handling. Regardless of levels: -15 on-road Speed, -30 off-road Speed. Wheeled ground vehicles only. Compatible with drive-by-wire and improved suspension.
mods.dpCost: Chassis DP cost × 1.5 per 1-point Handling change
mods.costNuyen: Cars: orig cost × 1.35/pt; Bikes: × 1.2/pt; Medium/Heavy Transports & Tractors: × 1.5/pt

mods.name: Remote-Control Interface
mods.description: Allows rigger to control vehicle via RC network. Provides base Pilot 1. Requires Sensor 1+.

mods.name: Rigger Adaptation
mods.description: Black box translating machine code to neurological stimuli. Includes datajack port. Gives VCR user full Control Pool and Reaction/Initiative bonuses.
mods.notes: Includes datajack port; required for VCR use

mods.name: Secondary Controls
mods.description: Duplicate basic steering/speed functions slaved to primary controls. Like co-pilot controls. Not available for motorcycles.

mods.name: Ablative Armor
mods.description: Each level adds +2 Armor (max Armor = Body). If struck by Power > 3x total Armor, reduce level by 1. Not for aircraft. Not concealable. No Skill Test to install/replace (6 hours). Not a design option.
mods.availability: L1: 8/14 days; L2: 12/14 days; L3: 14/21 days
mods.restrictions: Not for aircraft; not concealable; vehicle becomes security/military grade; not a design option
mods.notes: Not available as a design option. No Skill Test to install/replace.

mods.name: Advanced Passenger Protection Systems (APPSâ„¢)
mods.description: Secured belts, extra air bags, reinforced body panels. Reduces Power of crash damage by half. Exiting vehicle after crash requires Strength (5) Test. Not for motorcycles.

mods.name: Armor (Vehicle-Scale)
mods.description: Each point +1 Armor. Every 6 points added: +1 Handling (weight penalty). Body 0 vehicles cannot take vehicle armor.

mods.name: Armor (Personal-Scale)
mods.description: Ceramics and Kevlar panels. Ballistic only. Same effect as personal body armor vs. vehicle-scale weapons.

mods.name: Concealed Armor
mods.description: Hidden in interior spaces. Detection requires Perception Test (TN = 9 - (Armor/3, round up)). Not compatible with standard vehicle armor. Reduces interior cargo space.
mods.restrictions: Not compatible with standard vehicle armor
mods.notes: Detection TN = 9 - (Armor Rating ÷ 3, round up)

mods.name: Crash Cages
mods.description: Padded, hydraulically cushioned passenger cabin. In crash, each occupant gets +6 dice for Damage Resistance Test. Not for motorcycles.

mods.name: EnviroSeal™ System
mods.description: Gas-tight or watertight seals. Opening doors/hatches breaks seal. Optional cabin over-pressurization maintains seal even when doors open (doesn't work underwater or at Moderate+ damage).
mods.dpCost: Gas Seal: Body×3; Water Seal: Body×10; Engine Seal: Body×15; Cabin Over-pres: Body×75
mods.costNuyen: Gas Seal: Body×250¥; Water Seal: Body×750¥; Engine Seal: Body×1,000¥; Cabin Over-pres: Body×5,000¥
mods.restrictions: Not for motorcycles or vehicles with open entry points
mods.notes: Light damage breaches seal (5¥ slap-patches). Moderate+ requires vehicle work to re-seal.

mods.name: Life-Support Systems
mods.description: Provides oxygen and basic climate control inside sealed cabin or cockpit. Each CF dedicated provides 10 man-hours of support.

mods.name: Roll Bars
mods.description: Rag-top vehicles: negates double Damage Resistance penalty from crashes. Hard-top vehicles: +3 dice to all occupant Damage Resistance Tests after crash. Required for certain roof-mounted weapon mounts.
mods.notes: Required for ring mounts and certain civilian weapon mounts

mods.name: Smart Armor Systems (SAS)
mods.description: Explosive hexagonal cells with proximity sensors. Roll 2D6 per hit — 3+ activates. Each subsequent hit raises activation TN by 1. Activation reduces Damage Level by one step. Requires Armor 1+. Not for Body < 4 vehicles. Military-grade.
mods.restrictions: Requires Armor 1+; not for Body < 4 vehicles; military-grade
mods.notes: Cells replaceable (8 hrs, Vehicle B/R TN 2). Replacement: Body × 500¥

mods.name: Active Thermal Masking
mods.description: High-powered coolant absorbs engine heat. Each level: +1 Sig, âˆ’15 Speed (while active). Duration: (60 âˆ’ [maskingÃ—5]) minutes. After duration: Sig drops to 2 for 10-minute vent period. Generates 1 Stress Point per minute if run over duration.
mods.dpCost: Engine customization cost Ã— 2 (1st level); +0.25 multiplier per additional level
mods.costNuyen: Engine customization cost Ã— 2 (1st level); same multiplier progression
mods.maxRating: +2 Sig or engine customization level (whichever lower)
mods.restrictions: Requires Engine Customization; gas/methane/diesel/jet engines only

mods.name: Radar-Absorbent Materials (RAM)
mods.description: Special coatings/enamels that absorb radar signals. Each level +1 Signature, up to +3 max. Military-grade.

mods.name: Thermal Baffles
mods.description: Heat-blocking/absorbing materials on chassis. Reduces IR thermal signature. Cost varies by vehicle type. Gasoline/methane/diesel/jet engines only.
mods.costNuyen: Ground: BodyÃ—5,000Â¥; Motorcycles: BodyÃ—6,000Â¥; Trucks/Fixed-Wing: BodyÃ—7,500Â¥; Tractors/Helicopters: BodyÃ—10,000Â¥; Hovercraft: BodyÃ—3,750Â¥; Watercraft/Zeppelins: BodyÃ—2,500Â¥

mods.name: Ammunition Bins
mods.description: Additional ammunition storage for fixed mounts and turrets. 0.2 CF = 2,000 LMG rounds / 200 MMG rounds / 20 cannon rounds. Reload: 100 rounds/turn (Quickness (4) to double; failure = jam).
mods.cfDesign: 0.2 CF per 2,000 LMG/200 MMG/20 cannon rounds

mods.name: Fixed Mount â€” External Hardpoint
mods.description: Permanently affixed hardpoint mount. Fire arc â‰¤5Â°. âˆ’1 Signature. Not protected by vehicle armor. Side-facing mounts add recoil to Handling.
mods.restrictions: Security/military-grade; hardpoint = 2 pts; MMG and larger only
mods.notes: Total hardpoints+firmpoints â‰¤ vehicle Body

mods.name: Fixed Mount â€” External Firmpoint
mods.description: Permanently affixed firmpoint mount. Fire arc â‰¤5Â°. âˆ’1 Signature. Not protected by vehicle armor. LMGs and smaller only.
mods.restrictions: Security/military-grade; firmpoint = 1 pt; LMG and smaller

mods.name: Fixed Mount â€” Internal Hardpoint
mods.description: Internal hardpoint mount protected by vehicle armor. Hidden (Perception TN 4). Complex Action to extend/stow. âˆ’1 Sig while armed.
mods.notes: Hidden while stowed (Perception TN 4). âˆ’1 Sig while armed/extended.

mods.name: Fixed Mount â€” Internal Firmpoint
mods.description: Internal firmpoint mount protected by vehicle armor. Hidden (Perception TN 4). Complex Action to extend/stow. âˆ’1 Sig while armed. LMGs and smaller only.

mods.name: Gunnery Recoil Adjusters
mods.description: High-precision micro-actuators. Each level negates 1 point of recoil. Fixed mounts and turrets only. Not compatible with vehicle gyro-stabilization.
mods.maxRating: Fixed Firmpoint/Micro-Turret: 4; Mini-Turret: 6; Small/Fixed Hardpoint: 9; Medium+: 12
mods.restrictions: Fixed mounts and turrets only; incompatible with vehicle gyro-stabilization

mods.name: Launch Control System â€” Medium
mods.description: Controls firing of standard rockets/missiles. Consumes 1 firmpoint. Vehicle can fire up to (number of systems) rockets/missiles per Initiative Pass.

mods.name: Launch Control System â€” Heavy
mods.description: Controls firing of anti-ship rockets/missiles (damage code ending 'N'). Consumes 1 hardpoint.

mods.name: Pintle Mount
mods.description: Reinforced holes and swivels. Accepts any firmpoint-sized weapon. Arc: 60Â° left/right, 30Â° up/down. Counts as 1 firmpoint. Cannot be remotely controlled. 2 points recoil compensation.
mods.restrictions: Firmpoint weapons only; cannot be remotely controlled
mods.notes: 2 points recoil compensation. Mount/dismount: Complex Action.

mods.name: Ring Mount
mods.description: Freely rotating ring on top of vehicle. Full 360Â° rotation, Â±30Â° vertical. Hardtop only (convertibles need roll bars). Counts as 1 hardpoint. 6 points recoil compensation. Cannot be remotely controlled.
mods.cfDesign: 1 (+ 16 CF People Space for door gun)
mods.cfCustom: 1 (+ 16 CF People Space for door gun)
mods.restrictions: Hardtop only (or roll bars); cannot be remotely controlled; man-portable heavy or LMG only
mods.notes: 6 points recoil compensation. Mount/dismount: Complex Action + Quickness (4) if moving.

mods.name: Smartlink Integration Kit
mods.description: Interfaces smartgun weapons on fixed mounts/turrets with smartlink cyberware. Without kit, no smartlink bonus on Manual Gunnery Tests. Not needed for pintle/ring mounts.
mods.availability: Level I: 4/48 hrs; Level II: 6/48 hrs
mods.restrictions: Not needed for pintle/ring mounts; no effect on Sensor-Enhanced Gunnery or Missile Attack Tests

mods.name: Turret (Gunner) â€” Mini
mods.description: Motorized armored ring mount with gunner. 360Â° arc. Always âˆ’1 Signature. 1 Hardpoint. Weapon Value 2.
mods.availability: TN: vehicle cost Ã· 25 + 6; Days: (cost Ã· 25) Ã— 14
mods.restrictions: Requires roll bars on civilian vehicles
mods.notes: Anti-aircraft option: Ã—1.5 cost, +1 CF. Pop-up: doubled CF, âˆ’1 WV concealed, Complex Action to deploy.

mods.name: Turret (Gunner) â€” Small
mods.description: Motorized armored ring mount with gunner. 360Â° arc. Always âˆ’1 Sig. 2 CF internal. 2 Hardpoints. Weapon Value 3.
mods.availability: TN: vehicle cost Ã· 25 + 6; Days: (cost Ã· 25) Ã— 14
mods.notes: Includes 2 CF internal ammo space.

mods.name: Turret (Gunner) â€” Medium
mods.description: Large motorized turret with gunner. 360Â° arc. âˆ’1 Sig. 2 CF internal. 3 Hardpoints. Weapon Value 6. Military-grade.
mods.notes: Includes 2 CF internal space.

mods.name: Turret (Gunner) â€” Large
mods.description: Heavy armored gun turret with gunner. âˆ’1 Sig. 2 CF internal. 4 Hardpoints. Weapon Value 8. Military-grade.

mods.name: Remote Turret â€” Micro
mods.description: Smallest remote-controlled turret. Operated from inside vehicle. 1 Firmpoint. Weapon Value 1.

mods.name: Remote Turret â€” Mini
mods.description: Mini remote-controlled turret. 1 Hardpoint. Weapon Value 2. Operated from inside via remote sensors.
mods.availability: TN: vehicle cost Ã· 25 + 6; Days: (cost Ã· 25) Ã— 14

mods.name: Remote Turret â€” Small
mods.description: Small remote-controlled turret. 2 Hardpoints. Weapon Value 3. Security/military-grade.
mods.availability: TN: vehicle cost Ã· 25 + 6; Days: (cost Ã· 25) Ã— 14

mods.name: Remote Turret â€” Medium
mods.description: Medium remote-controlled turret. 3 Hardpoints. Weapon Value 6. Military-grade.

mods.name: Vehicle Gyroscopic Stabilizers
mods.description: For weapons on fixed mounts and turrets. Each point reduces recoil + movement modifiers. If total gyro rating > Body: +1 Handling per point over Body (penalty). Not compatible with gunnery recoil adjusters.
mods.notes: If gyro rating > Body: +1 Handling penalty per point over Body

mods.name: BattleTac FDDM Receiver Module
mods.description: Fire Direction and Data Management receiver. Links drone/vehicle to BattleTac network for coordinated fire control.

mods.name: BattleTac IVIS Receiver Module
mods.description: Intra-Vehicle Information System receiver. Links vehicle to BattleTac network for shared situational awareness.

mods.name: Electronic Countermeasures (ECM)
mods.description: Jams electronic signals. Ratings 5+ are military-grade. Base time: 16 hrs per level, Electronics B/R (TN 4).
mods.notes: See ECM Systems Table r2.137. Classifications: Standard/Enhanced/Advanced/Premium (civilian), Security I-III, Military I-III.

mods.name: Electronic Counter-Countermeasures (ECCM)
mods.description: Protects own electronics from ECM jamming. Ratings 5+ are military-grade. Base time: 16 hrs per level, Electronics B/R (TN 4).
mods.notes: See ECCM Systems Table r2.138. Classifications: Standard/Enhanced/Advanced/Premium (civilian), Security I-III, Military I-III.

mods.name: Electronic Deception (ED)
mods.description: Generates false sensor signatures to confuse enemy electronic warfare. Military-grade. Base time: 16 hrs per level, Electronics B/R (TN 4).
mods.notes: See ED Systems Table r2.138. Security I-III (civilian SI 3-4), Military I-III (SI 4.5-5/not available). Starts at Security I — no civilian-grade ED.

mods.name: Electronic Counter-Deception (ECD)
mods.description: Counters Electronic Deception systems. Starts at Security I — no civilian-grade ECD.
mods.notes: See ECD Systems Table r2.139. Security I-III (SI 3-4), Military I-III (SI 4.5-5/not available).

mods.name: Sensors
mods.description: Audio/video, thermal, radar, and ultrasound sensors plus ID/recognition/tracking software. Security I+ restricted to security/military.

mods.name: Electronics Port
mods.description: Required for non-vehicle electronics (radios, cameras, surveillance, RC decks) to draw vehicle power. Devices may increase Flux rating by half vehicle Body (round up). All ports linked to vehicle computer.
mods.cfDesign: 0.5 CF per 0.1 m³ of equipment (round up)

mods.name: Power Amplifiers
mods.description: Increase Flux ratings of sensors, ECM, ECCM, and hardwired RC decks. Increases effective range and EW resistance.

mods.name: Remote-Control Encryption Module
mods.description: Allows drone to decrypt encrypted RC signals and scramble its own transmissions. Network operates at rating of lowest module.

mods.name: Retransmission Unit ("Retrans")
mods.description: Intercepts RC deck signals and relays them to drones on a separate frequency. Increases effective RC range and provides extra EW defense. Has own Flux rating (base 0; increase with Power Amplifiers).

mods.name: Autosoft Interpretation System
mods.description: Skillwire system for drones. Allows use of autosofts and knowsofts. Chip ports = Pilot rating. Combined ratings of active programs â‰¤ Pilot Ã— 2. Programs must be rated â‰¤ Pilot.

mods.name: Anti-Theft System
mods.description: Enhanced vehicle maglock (Ratings 3â€“10+). Optional add-ons: Electric Shock (10S stun), Explosion (Power = BodyÂ²), Proximity Alert (requires sensors).
mods.costNuyen: R1-3: 100Â¥/rating; R4-6: 400Â¥/rating; R7-9: 1,000Â¥/rating; R10+: 5,000Â¥/rating; Standard Shock System: +2,000Â¥
mods.notes: Default vehicle maglock is Rating 2. Explosion: âˆ’1 Power per meter from vehicle.

mods.name: Amphibious Operation Package
mods.description: Modifies ground vehicles for water operations. L1: wheels (Speed 15 in water, +2 Handling). L2: propeller (Speed 30, no penalty). L3: water jets (Speed 45, no penalty).
mods.availability: L1: 5/10 days; L2: 6/12 days; L3: 3/6 days

mods.name: Drone Rack
mods.description: Hardware cradle that holds, launches, and recovers airborne drones while moving. Functions as mini-hangar (same Armor as vehicle; Body = half vehicle Body, round down).
mods.notes: Recovery requires simultaneous Handling Tests by driver and drone controller.

mods.name: Ejection Bucket Seat
mods.description: Solid-fuel rocket seat with parasail deployment on ejection. Reinforced version for trolls/orks (double cost).

mods.name: External Cargo Mounts
mods.description: Roof racks and externally mounted cargo boxes. +1 Handling when loaded. Max capacity = original internal cargo capacity. Customization only (cannot be added during design).

mods.name: Mechanical Arm
mods.description: Articulated arm with superior dexterity vs cranes. Strength = vehicle Body (lifts Str Ã— 20 kg). Max Str = 10 Ã— vehicle Body. Can take any cyberarm accessory at half cost. Not for Body 0 vehicles.
mods.notes: Cyberarm accessories at half cost (same Avail/SI)

mods.name: Medical Clinic
mods.description: Complete medical gear equivalent to a medical shop. Capacity determined by People Space. Rating 1â€“6.

mods.name: Photovoltaic Chameleon Paint
mods.description: Vehicle paint changes electronically. Minimum 1 Complex Action to change color. Not compatible with ruthenium polymers, smart armor, ablative armor, or RAM.
mods.restrictions: Incompatible with ruthenium polymers, smart armor, ablative armor, RAM

mods.name: Seat â€” Standard Bench
mods.description: 2 human passengers (3 cramped), 200 kg capacity. Removing frees 6 CF and +200 kg Load.

mods.name: Seat â€” Folding Bench
mods.description: Folds away, freeing 4 CF when folded. Stowed: 150 kg cargo in fold space.

mods.name: Seat â€” Standard Bucket
mods.description: 1 passenger, 100 kg capacity. Removing frees 6 CF and +100 kg Load.

mods.name: Seat â€” Reinforced Bench
mods.description: Heavy-duty bench for trolls/large metahumans. Up to 300 kg per seat.

mods.name: Spotlight
mods.description: Concentrated light beam. Effective range 600m. Available in standard white-light or infrared (invisible naked eye, illuminates for low-light/thermographic). Manual or remote control.

mods.name: Valkyrie Module
mods.description: One-patient robotic medical drone with rigger adaptation, RC interfaces, satellite uplink, datajack port, Pilot 5 (Adaptation Pool 5), and space for one patient.

mods.name: Winch
mods.description: Hydraulic winch on bumpers. Pulls/tows heavy loads (capacity by vehicle Body). Can pull vehicle across impassable terrain at 1 m/turn.

mods.name: Smoke Projector â€” Small (6 canisters)
mods.description: Creates 10m radius cloud or 10Ã—5Ã—4m ribbon, lasting 4 minutes. Obscures standard vision. IR smoke also obscures thermographic sensors.
mods.notes: IR: +1/+7 days to availability; cost Ã—120%

mods.name: Smoke Projector â€” Large (12 canisters)
mods.description: Creates 10m radius cloud or 10Ã—5Ã—4m ribbon, lasting 4 minutes. Obscures standard vision. IR smoke also obscures thermographic sensors.
mods.notes: IR: +1/+7 days to availability; cost Ã—120%

mods.name: Improve Robot's Learning Pool
mods.description: Increases a drone or robot's Learning Pool by 1 per level. Only applicable to drones/robots that have a Learning Pool.

mods.name: Living Amenities â€” Basic
mods.description: Folding bunks, portable toilets, mini-fridges. Equivalent to Low/coffin-hotel lifestyle. 12 CF per person.
mods.notes: Partial Amenities: half cost per person; no People Space; 1 partial per 50 persons.

mods.name: Living Amenities â€” Improved
mods.description: Equivalent to Middle lifestyle. 12 CF per person.

mods.name: Living Amenities â€” High
mods.description: Equivalent to High/Luxury lifestyle. 12 CF per person.

mods.name: Smart Materials (Helicopters)
mods.description: Eliminates rotor mechanical actuators that cause noise and increase radar cross-section. Increases Street Index by 1. Helicopters only.
mods.restrictions: Helicopters only; design only; +1 Street Index

mods.name: Structural Agility
mods.description: Each level +1 Reaction when driving; also raises Control Pool by 1 when rigging. Drive-by-wire level = max Structural Agility level. Cannot be added post-build.
mods.dpCost: Body Ã— 150 per level (plus drive-by-wire cost)
